name: fix-critical-websocket-bugs
description: Fix critical bugs in ws.py: (1) str(bytes) sends literal b... breaking JSON.parse on frontend, (2) synchronous storage.exists() blocks event loop, (3) no ping/pong keepalive, (4) pubsub.aclose() may not exist in redis-py <5.0.
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket messages decoded from bytes to utf-8 before sending
pubsub cleanup works with both redis-py 4.x and 5.x
